flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Clarks Summit University are 35% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($38.8k vs $59.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 52% at Clarks Summit University vs the 2003–2007 baseline (331 vs 689).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Clarks Summit University fell 39% between 2006 and 2009 (50.7% → 31.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Clarks Summit University fell 34% between 2006 and 2009 (74.0% → 49.0%).
